title: Database Integration in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/db' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture facilitates database interaction. It houses classes for database-specific functionalities, including 'DBInputFormat', 'DBOutputFormat', and 'DBConfiguration'. Specialized splitters like 'BigDecimalSplitter' and 'DateSplitter' cater to diverse data types. 'MySQLDBRecordReader' and 'OracleDBRecordReader' offer database-specific record reading, while 'MySQLDataDrivenDBRecordReader' and 'OracleDataDrivenDBRecordReader' handle SQL query execution. This directory's components collectively illustrate a shared responsibility in bridging Hadoop's distributed processing with relational databases, supporting multiple database systems and diverse data types, thereby enabling efficient data processing pipelines.
